_comment: Files known to read .runs/ artifacts via raw open()/json.load() without going through runs_reader.* helpers. The coherence rule `provenance_aware_runs_read` suppresses findings on these files during the soak period. Each entry should be migrated in a follow-up PR; when this list is empty, promote the rule's severity from `warn` to `block` and set is_strict_aoc=True in the HANDLERS entry. See `.claude/patterns/delegated-drifting-spring.md` follow-up plan.
